title: Let's Do Redraw
description: A resource pack that slightly changes the textures of items from the [Let's do] series of mods, making them more vanilla.
body:
The resource pack was created for version 1.20.1, but should be suitable for others. Does not require an OptiFine.

This texture pack changes some of the textures of mods in the series, as well as slightly edits most of them. For the most part, I've only changed the colors and shades, and improved the border.

This mod was in no way made to offend the work of the original texture artist, I just slightly changed them to fit my vision!

All textures and copyrights belong to [satisfyu](https://modrinth.com/user/satisfyu), the creator of the mods.
